title: OREGON HEALTH PLAN CARE COORDINATION NURSE ADVICE LINE - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS OREGON HEALTH PLAN CARE COORDINATION NURSE ADVICE LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Health Plan Care Coordination (OHPCC) Program is offered as a no-cost benefit for OHP open card members. Provides a 24-hour nurse advice service. Instructs members who are on a fee-for-service or Open Card on how to manage their care and locate providers. 500 Summer Street NE E-49 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: OHP Open Card members Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (800) 562-4620 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Nurse Advice Line (800) 562-4620 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Medical Information Services * Medicaid Recipients Physician Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - OHA OMBUDS PROGRAM FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP IN-PERSON APPLICATION ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OHP CLIENT SERVICES UNIT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON HEALTH PLAN SPECIALTY MEDICINE - OREGON VETERAN DENTAL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS
